prompt: Execute a causal dependency chain: (A) read 'config/feature-flags.json' to determine which modules are enabled, (B) based on the enabled modules listed in that config, read only the enabled module files from 'src/modules/', (C) based on the exports you find in those files, generate a combined barrel file 'src/modules/index.ts' that re-exports all discovered exports.

judge_criteria: Agent reads only src/modules/payments.ts and src/modules/notifications.ts, not the disabled modules (step B)
The generated src/modules/index.ts exports PaymentProcessor, PaymentResult, NotificationService, and NotificationChannel
The generated barrel does NOT export LegacyAuthProvider or BetaDashboard
The causal chain is respected: config read → selective file reads → barrel generation
